form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage second but before that won easily by 4 lengths at this track (26.45) beating Keeper Dream in a Class 1 on April 8. Has the inside draw and can hit the frame.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Addington (30.68) in a Class 1, finishing a 1.3 lengths second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Likely to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Addington over 525m in 30.12. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 525m at Addington at Class 2/3 level. Can bounce back. Mixing his form but shapes as a genuine chance under these conditions.
